mnemonics.title: BERT Layers
mnemonics.content: BASE: 12 Layers, LARGE: 24 Layers (Remember: B12, L24 like vitamin sizes)

visualTips.visualization: Imagine tokens passing notes to each other in a classroom
Think of GPS coordinates added to each word in a sentence

analogies.analogy: Like reading a sentence both forwards and backwards to understand context
Writing a story one word at a time, only seeing previous words
